evals.prompt: I have a game design doc at /mnt/c/workspace/obsidian/base/Clippings/如何成為世界級 Agentic Engineer.md that's gotten huge. Can you break it into Zettelkasten notes?
evals.expected_output: 7 atomic notes in a topic folder, source note updated with plain-text list
expectations: A topic folder exists at zettelkasten/如何成為世界級 Agentic Engineer/
Each atomic note covers exactly one concept (not mixing multiple topics)
Each atomic note has YAML frontmatter with title and tags
Each atomic note is 10-80 lines long
Each atomic note contains wikilinks to at least one sibling atomic note
No atomic note contains a backlink to the source note
Atomic note filenames are descriptive concept names without ID/date/source prefixes
Source note has a new section '## 原子筆記 (Atomic Notes)' appended
Source note's atomic notes list uses plain text, not wikilinks
All key concepts from the source are covered (context management, research/implementation separation, sycophancy, task completion, CLAUDE.md routing, rules/skills management, minimalism philosophy)
Each atomic note is self-contained (understandable without reading the source)
